fields.disclosure_text: The Company has a $125 million revolving line of credit with a syndication of various lenders and the Bank of Nova Scotia as the agent. As of December 31, 2009, the outstanding balance was $40 million with an interest rate of 1.51%. The maximum outstanding at any one time was $125 million and the weighted average interest rate was 1.91% for 2009. The Company also maintained a revolving line of credit with Kansas City Southern de Mexico, which is secured by certain Company assets. The outstanding balance at December 31, 2009 was $30 million with an interest rate of 4.21%. The maximum outstanding at any one time was $30 million and the weighted average interest rate was 4.88% for 2009
